name: Cindor
description: A small igneous beast whose heart burns like an eternal ember, born from Mythara's volcanic forges.

moves.name: Igneous Punch
moves.description: Launches itself wrapped in flames, striking with an incandescent fist.

moves.name: Fire Storm
moves.description: Spits molten magma that can set the target on fire.

moves.name: Grand Igneous Punch
moves.description: Unleashes a magma-charged punch that incinerates everything it touches.

distortion.name: Pyronox
distortion.description: A volcanic predator that exhales toxic ash and flames capable of melting rock in seconds.

moves.name: Igneous Punch
moves.description: Launches itself wrapped in flames, striking with an incandescent fist.

moves.name: Flare
moves.description: Projects a fire whirlwind that shatters the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Grand Igneous Impact
moves.description: A devastating strike that engulfs the rival in burning embers.

distortion.name: Vulcarion

moves.name: Igneous Punch
moves.description: Launches itself wrapped in flames, striking with an incandescent fist.

moves.name: Flare
moves.description: Projects a fire whirlwind that shatters the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Primordial Eruption
moves.description: Unleashes a volcanic eruption that shakes the battlefield's foundations, terrifying and devastating all rivals.

name: Aquaffin

moves.name: Whiplash
moves.description: Charges surrounded by marine currents.

moves.name: Torrent
moves.description: Projects a geyser that can freeze the target.

moves.name: Grand Whiplash
moves.description: Strikes with the crushing force of a giant wave.

distortion.name: Marivor

moves.name: Whiplash
moves.description: Charges surrounded by marine currents.

moves.name: Geyser
moves.description: Unleashes a pressurized geyser that cracks the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Grand Torrent
moves.description: Fires a column of extreme-pressure water that can freeze the target.

distortion.name: Leviandor
distortion.description: An ancient leviathan that reigns over Mythara's tides, capable of summoning oceanic storms and glacial blizzards.

moves.name: Whiplash
moves.description: Charges surrounded by marine currents.

moves.name: Geyser
moves.description: Unleashes a pressurized geyser that cracks the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Tide of the End
moves.description: Unleashes a glacial tide that freezes the battlefield and slows all rivals.

name: Spriglit

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Lashes with vines covered in sharp spines.

moves.name: Spore Burst

moves.name: Grand Charge

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Lashes with vines covered in sharp spines.

moves.name: Grand Vine Whip

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Lashes with vines covered in sharp spines.

moves.name: Toxic Spores
moves.description: Fires a dense cloud of venomous spores that penetrates any defense.

moves.description: Summons the power of the cosmos to curse and weaken all rivals at once.

name: Volspike

moves.name: Dash
moves.description: Ataca con garras chispeantes a velocidad fulgurante.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.description: Fires a blinding bolt that can paralyze the target.

moves.name: Grand Thunder Fist
moves.description: Executes a sonic-speed charge that can paralyze the rival.

distortion.name: Tharvel

moves.name: Dash
moves.description: Ataca con garras chispeantes a velocidad fulgurante.

moves.name: Electric Storm
moves.description: Unleashes an electromagnetic storm that paralyzes the opponent.

moves.name: Grand Discharge
moves.description: Releases a massive electrical discharge that melts the rival's resistance.

distortion.name: Stormveil
distortion.description: Lord of Mythara's storms, its body is a nexus of electromagnetic energy and astral power. The skies fracture in its wake.

moves.name: Dash
moves.description: Ataca con garras chispeantes a velocidad fulgurante.

moves.name: Electric Storm
moves.description: Unleashes an electromagnetic storm that paralyzes the opponent.

name: Dureth

moves.description: Strikes with its granite fist, crushing the target.

moves.name: Avalanche

moves.name: Rock Strike
moves.description: Strikes with its granite fist, crushing the target.

moves.name: Crystal Rain
moves.description: Fires crystal fragments that pierce the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Grand Seism

moves.name: Rock Strike
moves.description: Strikes with its granite fist, crushing the target.

moves.name: Crystal Rain
moves.description: Fires crystal fragments that pierce the opponent's defense.

moves.name: Total Crush

name: Caleth

moves.name: Frost Slash

moves.name: Blizzard

moves.description: Charges with all its glacial force, potentially freezing the rival.

distortion.name: Hivrel

moves.name: Frost Slash
moves.description: Arremete con garras cubiertas de escarcha.

moves.name: Grand Blizzard

moves.name: Frost Slash

moves.name: Ice Crystals
moves.description: Fires a burst of sharp ice crystals that can freeze the target.

name: Rumath

moves.name: Stone Charge
moves.description: Charges with all its rocky weight, crushing the target.

moves.name: Earthquake

moves.name: Seismic Impact

moves.name: Stone Charge
moves.description: Charges with all its rocky weight, crushing the target.

moves.name: Meteor Rain

moves.name: Grand Collapse

distortion.description: The living mountain. Magnaterra is the embodiment of Mythara's geological power, a being that carries volcanoes on its back.

moves.name: Stone Charge
moves.description: Charges with all its rocky weight, crushing the target.

moves.name: Meteor Rain
moves.description: Summons a rain of igneous rocks that can stun all rivals.

moves.name: Igneous Bite
moves.description: Bites the rival with fangs wrapped in flames.

moves.name: Igneous Bite
moves.description: Bites the rival with fangs wrapped in flames.

moves.name: Lava Flow
moves.description: Spits liquid lava that wraps around the rival, burning them deeply.

moves.name: Sting

moves.name: Sting
moves.description: Fires a swift sting with its stinger.

moves.name: Shrapnel

moves.description: Creates a gravitational field that crushes and slows all rivals.

moves.description: Creates a whirlpool that engulfs all rivals, slowing them with the force of water.

moves.name: Grand Maelstrom
moves.description: Unleashes a maelstrom that crushes the rival, stunning them and destroying their defenses.

distortion.name: Leviordis
distortion.description: Lord of the frozen seas. Leviordis freezes the ocean in its path and can summon ice tsunamis that destroy everything.

moves.name: Splash
moves.description: Fires a pressurized water jet with surprising accuracy.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Creates a whirlpool that engulfs all rivals, slowing them with the force of water.

moves.name: Glacial Tsunami
moves.description: Unleashes a tsunami of glacial water that freezes and paralyzes all rivals.

name: Sprivok
description: A small electric creature that leaps between metallic objects. Its static discharge can deactivate mechanisms instantly.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Discharges static electricity with surprising speed.

moves.name: Static Bolt
moves.description: Fires an electric arc that can paralyze the target.

moves.name: Grand Spark
moves.description: Discharges a concentrated lightning bolt that can paralyze the target.

distortion.name: Voltarion
distortion.description: Sombra de tormenta que condensa rayos en su cuerpo. Su simple presencia hace que el cabello se erize y los metales vibren.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Discharges static electricity with surprising speed.

moves.name: Lightning Chain
moves.description: Fires a chain of bolts that jumps between all rivals, potentially paralyzing them.

moves.name: Grand Thunderstorm
moves.description: Unleashes an electrical storm that paralyzes and slows all rivals.

distortion.name: Tempestrix
distortion.description: A sentient storm. Tempestrix is surrounded by an astral electromagnetic field capable of reforming at any point on the field.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Discharges static electricity with surprising speed.

moves.name: Lightning Chain
moves.description: Fires a chain of bolts that jumps between all rivals, potentially paralyzing them.

moves.name: Supercell
moves.description: Summons an astral storm supercell that paralyzes and terrifies all rivals with cosmic energy.

name: Grimveil
description: A creature covered by a permanent veil of darkness. Its eyes reflect a void that paralyzes whoever gazes too long.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Scratches with claws of pure shadow.

moves.name: Empty Gaze
moves.description: Fixes its empty gaze on the rival, potentially terrifying them.

moves.name: Grand Claw
moves.description: Tears at the rival with pure darkness claws, terrifying them.

distortion.name: Phantaveil
distortion.description: A ghost of living shadows. Phantaveil can briefly possess rivals' fears and use them as weapons.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Scratches with claws of pure shadow.

moves.name: Nightmare
moves.description: Materializes the rival's nightmares, terrifying them and weakening their attack.

moves.name: Grand Terror
moves.description: Unleashes absolute terror that terrifies all rivals and curses the nearest one.

distortion.name: Oblivrath
distortion.description: Oblivion made flesh. Oblivrath erases its enemies' will with its mental miasma, leaving only empty shells where warriors once stood.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Scratches with claws of pure shadow.

moves.name: Nightmare
moves.description: Materializes the rival's nightmares, terrifying them and weakening their attack.

moves.name: Erase Will
moves.description: Erases all rivals' will, cursing them and draining their vital essence.

name: Thornax
description: A herbaceous creature covered in retractable venomous spines. When agitated, its spines can reach distant targets.

moves.name: Spine
moves.description: Fires a spine with cutting precision.

moves.name: Spine Rain
moves.description: Shakes its body, firing a rain of spines that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Thorn
moves.description: Fires its longest, most venomous spine with devastating force.

distortion.name: Toxithorn
distortion.description: A predatory shrub whose spines produce a plant neurotoxin with no known antidote. Its roots actively hunt prey.

moves.name: Spine
moves.description: Fires a spine with cutting precision.

moves.name: Neurotoxin
moves.description: Injects neurotoxin that poisons and slows the target with guaranteed effect.

moves.name: Grand Toxic Spine
moves.description: Drives its most venomous spine, destroying the rival's defenses and poisoning them.

distortion.name: Mordivyne
distortion.description: The carnivorous garden. Mordivyne is a mass of sentient venomous vines that can engulf prey whole and dissolve them slowly.

moves.name: Spine
moves.description: Fires a spine with cutting precision.

moves.name: Neurotoxin
moves.description: Injects neurotoxin that poisons and slows the target with guaranteed effect.

moves.name: Engulf
moves.description: Wraps the rival in venomous vines, massively draining their vitality and cursing them.

name: Lumivex
description: A being of pure stellar light. Its photons strike at the speed of light and can pierce any physical barrier.

moves.name: Photon
moves.description: Strikes with a flash of stellar light at maximum speed.

moves.name: Prism
moves.description: Decomposes light into prisms that blind all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Star Beam
moves.description: Fires a beam of stellar energy that blinds and destroys the target's defenses.

distortion.name: Solantis
distortion.description: A cosmic being that manipulates the laws of gravity and time. Its mere presence distorts surrounding space.

moves.name: Photon
moves.description: Strikes with a flash of stellar light at maximum speed.

moves.name: Solar Explosion
moves.description: Unleashes a solar explosion that permanently blinds all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Cosmic Flash
moves.description: Unleashes a flash of cosmic energy that weakens and terrifies all rivals.

distortion.name: Luxarath
distortion.description: The sun incarnate. Luxarath is the fusion of stellar energy and primordial fire. Where its gaze falls, darkness vanishes forever.

moves.name: Photon
moves.description: Strikes with a flash of stellar light at maximum speed.

moves.name: Solar Explosion
moves.description: Unleashes a solar explosion that permanently blinds all rivals.

moves.name: Solar Judgment
moves.description: Launches the star's judgment, setting all rivals ablaze and devastating their attack capability.

name: Cryoveth
description: A being of living ice whose body temperature is below absolute zero. Everything it touches freezes into perfect crystals.

moves.name: Ice Claw
moves.description: Scratches the rival with claws that freeze on contact.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description: Unleashes a frozen blizzard that can freeze all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Avalanche
moves.description: Summons a glacial avalanche that can freeze the target and slows all rivals.

distortion.name: Glaciveth
distortion.description: A titan of eternal ice. Glaciveth can freeze the very air within its range, converting the battlefield into a glacial tomb.

moves.name: Ice Claw
moves.description: Scratches the rival with claws that freeze on contact.

moves.name: Glacial Breath
moves.description: Exhales a below-absolute-zero breath that can freeze all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Ice Age
moves.description: Triggers a miniature ice age, freezing and paralyzing all rivals.

distortion.name: Abyssalfrost
distortion.description: Eternal winter. Abyssalfrost is the union of cold and primordial darkness. Those who die frozen by its hand are trapped as specters within it.

moves.name: Ice Claw
moves.description: Scratches the rival with claws that freeze on contact.

moves.name: Glacial Breath
moves.description: Exhales a below-absolute-zero breath that can freeze all rivals.

moves.name: Glacial Void
moves.description: Opens a glacial void that freezes and curses all rivals, trapping their souls eternally.

name: Stoven
description: A miniature volcanic stone golem. Though small, it is extraordinarily dense and its blows resound like landslides.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: Strikes with the density of solid rock.

moves.name: Stone Throw
moves.description: Fires rock fragments that can slow the target.

moves.name: Grand Boulder
moves.description: Fires a rock from its own body that can stun the target.

distortion.name: Golemrak
distortion.description: A golem of primordial rock assembled from centuries of sediment. Its body absorbs impacts that would destroy any other being.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: Strikes with the density of solid rock.

moves.name: Seism
moves.description: Triggers a local quake that can stun all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Stone Avalanche
moves.description: Hurls its own body in an avalanche, crushing all rivals and destroying their defenses.

distortion.name: Terracorath
distortion.description: The living continent. Terracorath carries centuries of geological history in its body. Ancient trees sprout from its cracks and rivers flow between its rock folds.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: Strikes with the density of solid rock.

moves.name: Seism
moves.description: Triggers a local quake that can stun all rivals.

moves.name: Continental Drift
moves.description: Shifts its continental mass, crushing and poisoning all rivals with primordial earth.

name: Embralith
description: An igneous rock colossus that guards Mythara's volcanic depths. Few know that beneath its shell sleeps something far older than fire itself.

moves.name: Igneous Fist
moves.description: Strikes with its incandescent rock fist. The impact leaves a burning crater.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.description: Erupts lava from cracks in its shell, burning all rivals on the field.

moves.name: Cataclysm
moves.description: Unleashes a seismic-scale volcanic cataclysm. Burns and stuns all rivals with the fury of the earth.

distortion.name: Seraphon
distortion.description: The volcanic shell shatters. From the flames emerges Seraphon — the fallen angel who burned for eons trapped in the world's core. Its astral fire wings once tore through Mythara's sky before being chained. Now it remembers.

moves.name: Igneous Fist
moves.description: Strikes with its incandescent rock fist. The impact leaves a burning crater.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.description: Erupts lava from cracks in its shell, burning all rivals on the field.

moves.name: Seraphic Apocalypse
moves.description: Seraphon spreads its astral fire wings and unleashes the apocalypse. A storm of sacred light and eternal flames burns, terrifies and destroys all rivals' defenses. The sky weeps.

name: Stormeid
description: A storm spirit that crosses the sky at lightning speed. Its silhouette is only visible in the flash that precedes the thunder.

moves.name: Quick Bolt
moves.description: Strikes with the speed of lightning before the rival can react.

moves.name: Electric Storm
moves.description: Creates an electrical storm that can paralyze all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Lightning
moves.description: Discharges a maximum-power lightning bolt that paralyzes the target and slows all rivals.

distortion.name: Thundereid
distortion.description: A storm demigod. Thundereid can summon charged clouds in any weather and its cry sounds like thunder that shakes mountains.

moves.name: Quick Bolt
moves.description: Strikes with the speed of lightning before the rival can react.

moves.name: Thunder Drumroll
moves.description: Unleashes a barrage of consecutive thunderclaps that can paralyze all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Electric Collapse
moves.description: Collapses the entire electrical field into a single point, paralyzing all rivals and destroying their attack capability.

distortion.name: Stormarcath
distortion.description: The cosmic electric arc. Stormarcath connects Mythara's sky with outer space, being a living conductor of the universe's energy.

moves.name: Quick Bolt
moves.description: Strikes with the speed of lightning before the rival can react.

moves.name: Thunder Drumroll
moves.description: Unleashes a barrage of consecutive thunderclaps that can paralyze all rivals.

moves.name: Stellar Discharge
moves.description: Channels cosmic electricity into a discharge that paralyzes and terrifies all rivals.

name: Nyxareth
description: La Tejedora de Sombras. Nyxareth existe desde antes del primer amanecer de Mythara, tejiendo el tejido de la oscuridad que sostiene la realidad.

moves.name: Night Thread
moves.description: Corta con un hilo de oscuridad pura que atraviesa cualquier defensa.

moves.name: Cosmic Veil
moves.description: Weaves an astral veil that curses and blinds all rivals.

moves.name: Eternal Night
moves.description: Summons eternal night that curses, drains the essence and terrifies all rivals with the primordial power of cosmic darkness.

distortion.name: Nyxareth Abissal
distortion.description: The Awakened Primordial Darkness. Nyxareth Abyssal is the state where the Weaver abandons all restraint. The universe trembles and stars go dark in its wake.

moves.name: Night Thread
moves.description: Corta con un hilo de oscuridad pura que atraviesa cualquier defensa.

moves.name: Cosmic Veil
moves.description: Weaves an astral veil that curses and blinds all rivals.

moves.name: End of Light
moves.description: Extinguishes all stars in Mythara's universe. The ultimate attack: curses, drains and terrifies all rivals.

name: Scoravel
description: A volcanic rock scorpion whose tail stores pressurized magma. Its stinger can pierce armor and burn from within.

moves.name: Igneous Spike
moves.description: Drives its incandescent stinger with deadly precision.

moves.name: Pressurized Lava
moves.description: Expels pressurized lava that can burn all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Stab
moves.description: Injects magma directly with its stinger, burning the target and destroying their defense.

distortion.name: Pyroscavel
distortion.description: A colossus scorpion of obsidian and living magma. Pyroscavel can bury its stinger in rock and make it erupt beneath the enemy's feet.

moves.name: Igneous Spike
moves.description: Drives its incandescent stinger with deadly precision.

moves.name: Volcanic Rift
moves.description: Opens volcanic cracks beneath all rivals, burning and destroying their defenses.

moves.name: Grand Stinger Eruption
moves.description: Injects a massive magma charge that burns and can stun the target from within.

distortion.name: Inferoscavel
distortion.description: The Great Scorpion of Hell. Inferoscavel carries a volcano in its tail. Its claws can split mountains and its stinger unleashes chain eruptions.

moves.name: Igneous Spike
moves.description: Drives its incandescent stinger with deadly precision.

moves.name: Volcanic Rift
moves.description: Opens volcanic cracks beneath all rivals, burning and destroying their defenses.

moves.name: Igneous Apocalypse
moves.description: Unleashes an apocalypse of magma and rock that burns and stuns all rivals with the force of the earth.

name: Shadorel
description: A creature that inhabits the marine depths where no light reaches. Its body is liquid darkness that changes shape to deceive prey.

moves.name: Black Claw
moves.description: Attacks from the sea floor with its shadow claw.

moves.name: Dark Tide
moves.description: Summons a tide of dark water that blinds all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Shadow Current
moves.description: Drags the rival with a marine darkness current, draining their vitality and terrifying them.

distortion.name: Abyssadorel
distortion.description: A leviathan of marine shadows. Abyssadorel can create zones of total darkness underwater where its attacks are undetectable.

moves.name: Black Claw
moves.description: Attacks from the sea floor with its shadow claw.

moves.name: Infinite Depth
moves.description: Drags rivals toward the infinite deep, slowing them with abyssal pressure.

moves.name: Grand Umbral Vortex
moves.description: Creates a vortex of marine shadows that drains all rivals' vital essence and curses them.

distortion.name: Nyxadorel
distortion.description: The abyss made flesh. Nyxadorel is the ocean floor personified: total darkness, crushing pressure and the certainty that nothing can survive here.

moves.name: Black Claw
moves.description: Attacks from the sea floor with its shadow claw.

moves.name: Infinite Depth
moves.description: Drags rivals toward the infinite deep, slowing them with abyssal pressure.

moves.name: Tide of the End
moves.description: Unleashes the final tide that curses all rivals and massively drains their vital energy.

name: Floraven
description: A floral bird that crosses the sky among constellations. Its feathers are petals imbued with stellar energy that heal allies on touch and burn enemies.

moves.name: Stellar Petal
moves.description: Fires a petal imbued with cosmic energy with perfect precision.

moves.name: Floral Rain
moves.description: Releases a rain of toxic petals that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Cosmic Flight
moves.description: Sweeps the field in a cosmic flight that disorients and slows all rivals.

distortion.name: Astroven
distortion.description: A cosmic-plant phoenix. Astroven is reborn from stellar spores and its plumage absorbs and redistributes the energy of received attacks.

moves.name: Stellar Petal
moves.description: Fires a petal imbued with cosmic energy with perfect precision.

moves.name: Nova Floral
moves.description: Explodes in a floral nova that poisons and destroys all rivals' defenses.

moves.name: Grand Rebirth
moves.description: Reborn in a cosmic energy explosion, terrifying rivals and draining their vitality.

distortion.name: Celestraven
distortion.description: The bird of eternal dawn. Celestraven is a symbol of life and cosmic renewal. Where it flies the sky blooms and wounds heal on their own.

moves.name: Stellar Petal
moves.description: Fires a petal imbued with cosmic energy with perfect precision.

moves.name: Nova Floral
moves.description: Explodes in a floral nova that poisons and destroys all rivals' defenses.

moves.name: Cosmic Dawn
moves.description: Summons the cosmic dawn in an explosion that terrifies and poisons all rivals with primordial light.

name: Icehorn
description: A beast of ice and shadows that hunts in polar darkness. Its black ice horns drain body heat on impact.

moves.name: Dark Horn
moves.description: Charges with its black ice horns that paralyze on contact.

moves.name: Polar Mist
moves.description: Generates a dark polar mist that blinds all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Shadow Horn
moves.description: Drives its shadowy horn, freezing the rival and draining their vital heat.

distortion.name: Darkfrost
distortion.description: The shadowy winter. Darkfrost converts the field into a dark polar tundra where visibility is zero and temperature is lethal.

moves.name: Dark Horn
moves.description: Charges with its black ice horns that paralyze on contact.

moves.name: Polar Storm
moves.description: Unleashes a polar storm that can freeze all rivals and slows them.

moves.name: Grand Glacial Extinction
moves.description: Triggers a dark glacial extinction that freezes and terrifies all rivals.

distortion.name: Umbraglacis
distortion.description: Absolute polar darkness. Umbraglacis is the personification of Mythara's pole: a being that is simultaneously eternal cold and endless night.

moves.name: Dark Horn
moves.description: Charges with its black ice horns that paralyze on contact.

moves.name: Polar Storm
moves.description: Unleashes a polar storm that can freeze all rivals and slows them.

moves.name: End of Winter
moves.description: Freezes and curses all rivals with the eternal cold of endless polar winter.

name: Verdox
description: A small herbaceous reptile covered in living moss. When agitated, releases healing spores for allies and toxic ones for enemies.

moves.name: Vine Lash
moves.description: Strikes with its tail covered in hardened moss.

moves.name: Spore Burst
moves.description: Releases toxic spores that can poison the target.

moves.name: Grand Plant Charge
moves.description: Charges at full speed, poisoning the target with its moss spines.

distortion.name: Mossrath
distortion.description: A forest guardian covered in a cloak of millennial moss. Its spores can heal severe wounds or poison entire systems.

moves.name: Vine Lash
moves.description: Strikes with its tail covered in hardened moss.

moves.name: Spore Rain
moves.description: Releases a dense cloud of spores that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Moss Impact
moves.description: Crushes with its moss mass, poisoning and slowing all rivals.

distortion.name: Sylvamoth
distortion.description: The stellar guardian of the eternal forest. Sylvamoth projects stellar light spores that heal what they touch and its wings grow stellar flowers when beating.

moves.name: Vine Lash
moves.description: Strikes with its tail covered in hardened moss.

moves.name: Spore Rain
moves.description: Releases a dense cloud of spores that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Blooming Cosmos
moves.description: Makes the cosmos bloom with stellar toxins that poison and weaken all rivals' attack.

name: Voltrix
description: An electric being that recharges by absorbing stellar energy. Its bolts travel through spacetime, reaching targets that have not yet moved.

moves.name: Stellar Arc
moves.description: Discharges an electric arc charged with stellar energy.

moves.name: Temporal Pulse
moves.description: Emits a pulse that alters the temporal flow, slowing all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Cosmic Bolt
moves.description: Discharges a cosmic energy bolt that can paralyze all rivals and weakens their attack.

distortion.name: Astraltrix
distortion.description: An astral electromagnetic entity. Astraltrix can predict the rival's next move and discharge its attack before it occurs.

moves.name: Stellar Arc
moves.description: Discharges an electric arc charged with stellar energy.

moves.name: Predictive Lightning
moves.description: Discharges predictive bolts that strike before the rival acts, potentially paralyzing them all.

moves.name: Grand Electric Fate
moves.description: Rewrites the rivals' electrical fate, paralyzing and terrifying all with inevitable energy.

distortion.name: Kronaltrix
distortion.description: The Master of Electrical Time. Kronaltrix can briefly stop time for everyone except itself, discharging its full arsenal while the world stands still.

moves.name: Stellar Arc
moves.description: Discharges an electric arc charged with stellar energy.

moves.name: Predictive Lightning
moves.description: Discharges predictive bolts that strike before the rival acts, potentially paralyzing them all.

moves.name: Universal Discharge
moves.description: Releases all the electricity of the universe in an instant, paralyzing all rivals and destroying their attack capability.

name: Petrox
description: A sedimentary rock turtle that accumulates stone layers with age. Its blows generate seismic waves that persist after impact.

moves.name: Seismic Impact
moves.description: Strikes, generating a seismic wave that reverberates across the field.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.description: Launches an avalanche of stone fragments that slows all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Earthquake
moves.description: Triggers a local earthquake that can stun all rivals.

distortion.name: Magnorok
distortion.description: A titan of magnetic rock. Magnorok can attract and repel masses of metal and stone, controlling the battlefield like a gravitational force.

moves.name: Seismic Impact
moves.description: Strikes, generating a seismic wave that reverberates across the field.

moves.name: Magnetic Field
moves.description: Creates a magnetic field that interferes with all rivals' movements and accuracy.

moves.name: Grand Seismic Collapse
moves.description: Collapses its magnetic field in a seismic explosion that stuns and destroys all rivals' defenses.

distortion.name: Titanorok
distortion.description: The Eternal Titan. Titanorok is a mountain with its own will: metal and rock fused in Mythara's most resistant being.

moves.name: Seismic Impact
moves.description: Strikes, generating a seismic wave that reverberates across the field.

moves.name: Magnetic Field
moves.description: Creates a magnetic field that interferes with all rivals' movements and accuracy.

moves.name: Total Collapse
moves.description: Collapses upon all rivals with all its rocky and metallic mass, stunning and annihilating their defenses.

name: Venenyx
description: A fluorescent venom serpent. Its bite inoculates a neurotoxin that acts in seconds and its skin glows in the dark, attracting curious prey.

moves.name: Toxic Bite
moves.description: Bites with its fluorescent fangs, instantly injecting venom.

moves.name: Venom Spit
moves.description: Spits fluorescent venom that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Fang
moves.description: Drives its fangs with maximum power, injecting venom with high probability.

distortion.name: Phosphoryx
distortion.description: A bioluminescent toxin serpent. Phosphoryx can control its glow intensity to hypnotize or blind its rivals.

moves.name: Toxic Bite
moves.description: Bites with its fluorescent fangs, instantly injecting venom.

moves.name: Toxic Acid Rain
moves.description: Spits a rain of fluorescent acid venom that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Luminous Venom
moves.description: Drives its fangs with maximum power, poisoning and draining the target's vital essence.

distortion.name: Voidenyx
distortion.description: The Serpent of the Void. Voidenyx weaves a shadow venom that not only poisons the body but corrodes the soul, leaving victims without will.

moves.name: Toxic Bite
moves.description: Bites with its fluorescent fangs, instantly injecting venom.

moves.name: Toxic Acid Rain
moves.description: Spits a rain of fluorescent acid venom that can poison all rivals.

moves.name: Venom Eclipse
moves.description: Triggers a venomous eclipse that poisons and curses all rivals with toxic darkness.

name: Frostael
description: A small winter spirit that rides snowflakes. Where Frostael passes, the ground becomes frost-covered and rivals' steps grow uncertain.

moves.name: Frost Veil
moves.description: Strikes, leaving a layer of frost that freezes on contact.

moves.name: Gale
moves.description: Unleashes a freezing gale that slows all rivals.

moves.name: Grand Snowstorm
moves.description: Summons an intense snowfall that can freeze the target.

distortion.name: Blizzarath
distortion.description: A blizzard spirit. Blizzarath can create localized storms of maximum intensity and move them over enemies with surgical precision.

moves.name: Frost Veil
moves.description: Strikes, leaving a layer of frost that freezes on contact.

moves.name: Localized Storm
moves.description: Directs a maximum-intensity storm over all rivals, potentially freezing them.

moves.name: Grand Blizzard
moves.description: Unleashes a maximum-power blizzard that freezes and paralyzes all rivals.

distortion.name: Permafrostis
distortion.description: The permafrost incarnate. Permafrostis is the union of eternal ice and glacial rock: a being that carries centuries of winter compressed in its frozen stone body.

moves.name: Frost Veil
moves.description: Strikes, leaving a layer of frost that freezes on contact.

moves.name: Localized Storm
moves.description: Directs a maximum-intensity storm over all rivals, potentially freezing them.

moves.name: Total Glaciation
moves.description: Completely freezes the field, trapping and stunning all rivals in ice and glacial rock.

name: Iraeth
description: A small forged iron automaton that self-corrects and repairs its damaged components in combat. Its blows sound like hammer strikes in a forge.

moves.name: Hammer Blow
moves.description: Strikes with the force of a forge with every impact.

moves.name: Iron Shot
moves.description: Fires an iron projectile that pierces the target's defense.

moves.name: Grand Iron Impact
moves.description: Charges all its systems into a devastating blow that can stun the target.

distortion.name: Iraegor
distortion.description: An autonomous war machine of tempered steel. Iraegor learns from every impact received and redistributes the damage energy into its next attack.

moves.name: Hammer Blow
moves.description: Strikes with the force of a forge with every impact.

moves.name: Metal Overcharge
moves.description: Releases a metallic energy overload that pierces all rivals' defenses.

moves.name: Grand Iron Charge
moves.description: Activates all its systems and charges at maximum power, stunning and destroying all rivals' defenses.

distortion.name: Omniraeth
distortion.description: The ultimate fortress. Omniraeth is the fusion of millennial engineering and savage electricity: a war machine that generates its own electromagnetic force field.

moves.name: Hammer Blow
moves.description: Strikes with the force of a forge with every impact.

moves.name: Metal Overcharge
moves.description: Releases a metallic energy overload that pierces all rivals' defenses.

moves.name: Extermination Protocol
moves.description: Activates the extermination protocol: massive electromagnetic discharge that paralyzes and annihilates all rivals' defenses.

name: Glaceth
description: A small ice elemental that inhabits glacial caves. Its semi-transparent body acts as a prism, dispersing light into cold flashes.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Fires sharp ice fragments at the enemy.

moves.name: Frost Bite
moves.description: Bites with ice teeth. Can freeze the target.

moves.name: Blizzard Call
moves.description: Summons a snowstorm that lashes all enemies.

distortion.name: Glacoveth
distortion.description: When distorting, Glaceth compacts into a more threatening form. Its core emits a cold so intense it paralyzes the surrounding air.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Fires sharp ice fragments at the enemy.

moves.name: Cryo Lance
moves.description: Projects a solid ice lance with armor penetration.

moves.name: Absolute Zero
moves.description: Reaches minimum absolute temperature and unleashes an annihilating cold wave.

distortion.name: Cryomancer
distortion.description: The epic form of Glaceth. A lord of cosmic ice whose body reflects winter constellations. Can crystallize dark matter.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Fires sharp ice fragments at the enemy.

moves.name: Cryo Lance
moves.description: Projects a solid ice lance with armor penetration.

moves.name: Stellar Glaciation
moves.description: Summons the cold of interstellar void, glaciating all enemies with stellar energy.

name: Venokrel
description: A serpentine creature with venom glands in its dorsal spines. Secretes toxins when threatened.

moves.name: Venom Sting
moves.description: A basic bite that injects a small dose of venom.

moves.name: Toxic Spores
moves.description: Fires a cloud of toxic spores that can poison the target.

moves.name: Venom Burst
moves.description: Releases all venom glands in a massive toxic explosion.

moves.name: Venom Sting
moves.description: A basic bite that injects a small dose of venom.

moves.name: Hydra Bite
moves.description: Ataque con las tres cabezas de la hidra, cada una inyectando un veneno distinto.

moves.name: Triple Venom
moves.description: The three heads attack simultaneously with devastating combined venoms.

distortion.name: Aborventh
distortion.description: The final form. A colossal hydra that inhabits the darkest swamps. Its venoms are so potent they dissolve shadow itself.

moves.name: Venom Sting
moves.description: A basic bite that injects a small dose of venom.

moves.name: Hydra Bite
moves.description: Ataque con las tres cabezas de la hidra.

moves.name: Void Hydra
moves.description: The heads open to the shadows of the void, releasing an unstoppable torrent of dark venom.

name: Stonark
description: A rock armadillo with living granite plates that regenerate over time. Its dorsal spines are volcanic rock fragments.

moves.name: Rock Slam
moves.description: Strikes with brute force using its rocky mass.

moves.name: Granite Roll
moves.description: Rolls into a ball and rolls at great speed, crushing the target.

moves.name: Seismic Crush
moves.description: Triggers a local mini-earthquake that crushes everything in a wide radius.

distortion.name: Granithorn
distortion.description: La armadura de Stonark se expande en una fortaleza viviente. Torres de roca brotan de su espalda como castillos en miniatura.

moves.name: Rock Slam
moves.description: Strikes with brute force using its rocky mass.

moves.name: Fortress Bash
moves.description: Charges with its fortress-body, crushing everything with colossal weight.

moves.name: Tectonic Rupture
moves.description: Triggers a tectonic rupture that fractures the ground beneath all enemies.

distortion.name: Terravorath
distortion.description: The elite form. A titan of stone and molten metal. Inside burns a magma core that feeds its body of rock reinforced with volcanic iron.

moves.name: Rock Slam
moves.description: Strikes with brute force using its rocky mass.

moves.name: Fortress Bash
moves.description: Charges with its fortress-body, crushing everything with colossal weight.

moves.name: Worldbreaker
moves.description: A punch that fragments solid reality, devastating all enemies simultaneously.

name: Voltling
description: A small electric being resembling a giant firefly. Its abdomen stores static electricity it releases in flashes.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Fires a basic electric spark at the target.

moves.name: Static Dash
moves.description: Charges at high speed loaded with static electricity.

moves.name: Thunder Flash
moves.description: Releases all accumulated energy in a lightning discharge that blinds and paralyzes.

distortion.name: Voltrazor
distortion.description: Voltling transforms into an electric bird with sharp wings. Each feather is a conducting antenna capable of channeling lightning.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Fires a basic electric spark at the target.

moves.name: Razor Wing
moves.description: Corta al enemigo con alas electrizadas como cuchillas.

moves.name: Thunderbird
moves.description: Transforms into a lightning bird and pierces through all enemies, leaving electrical trails.

distortion.name: Stormravel
distortion.description: The epic form. A Thunderbird that absorbs entire storms. Its shadows are trapped lightning bolts awaiting release.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Fires a basic electric spark at the target.

moves.name: Razor Wing
moves.description: Corta al enemigo con alas electrizadas como cuchillas.

moves.name: Blackstorm
moves.description: Unleashes a black storm of lightning and shadows that consumes the entire battlefield.

name: Grovekin
description: A plant being shaped like a child made entirely of moss and wildflowers. Its eyes glow with firefly light.

moves.name: Leaf Toss
moves.description: Fires sharp leaves at the enemy.

moves.name: Entangle
moves.description: Wraps the enemy with roots and vines, reducing their speed.

moves.name: Bloom Wave
moves.description: Releases a wave of floral energy that heals allies while damaging enemies.

distortion.name: Sylvaken
distortion.description: Grovekin blooms into a forest guardian. Its moss becomes plant armor and its flowers become thorny weapons.

moves.name: Leaf Toss
moves.description: Fires sharp leaves at the enemy.

moves.name: Thorn Lash
moves.description: Strikes with branches full of spines that bleed the target.

moves.name: Forest Fury
moves.description: Summons all the fury of the forest in a charge of roots, thorns and plant energy.

distortion.name: Arborvex
distortion.description: The epic form. A walking carnivorous tree with venomous vine tentacles. Its sap is a slow-acting, inevitable poison.

moves.name: Leaf Toss
moves.description: Fires sharp leaves at the enemy.

moves.name: Thorn Lash
moves.description: Strikes with branches full of spines that bleed the target.

moves.name: World Devour
moves.description: The tree opens its maw and devours all enemies' vital energy.

name: Embrix
description: A juvenile fire dragon with wings still developing. Its scales are hardened embers that glow with variable temperature depending on its emotional state.

moves.name: Ember Claw
moves.description: Ataca con garras incandescentes que queman al contacto.

moves.name: Flame Breath
moves.description: Exhales a concentrated flare that can burn the target.

moves.name: Inferno Spiral
moves.description: Gira en espiral envuelto en llamas, creando un tornado de fuego que arrasa todo.

distortion.name: Pyraldrax
distortion.description: Embrix fully develops its wings. It can now fly to extreme heights where the dry air intensifies its flames.

moves.name: Ember Claw
moves.description: Ataca con garras incandescentes que queman al contacto.

moves.name: Dragonic Dive
moves.description: Dives from great height, wrapped in flames, onto a target.

moves.name: Hellfire Reign
moves.description: Brings hellfire rain to the battlefield, burning everything indiscriminately.

distortion.name: Infernarex
distortion.description: The elite form. A dragon whose flames now burn in the astral spectrum. Its eyes see beyond the physical plane and its flames consume essence itself.

moves.name: Ember Claw
moves.description: Ataca con garras incandescentes que queman al contacto.

moves.name: Dragonic Dive
moves.description: Dives from great height, wrapped in flames, onto a target.

moves.name: Cosmic Immolation
moves.description: La llamarada definitiva que toca el sol. Todo lo que toca es consumido incluso en el plano astral.

name: Shaelur
description: Una criatura de sombra que vive en los rincones oscuros. Parece un gato hecho de humo oscuro con ojos amarillos que flotan independientemente.

moves.name: Shadow Strike
moves.description: Basic attack from the shadows.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: Emits a dark energy pulse that can cause fear.

moves.name: Nightmare Shroud
moves.description: Wraps the enemy in materialized nightmares that terrify and damage.

distortion.name: Shadowmaw
distortion.description: Shaelur's shadow grows and takes the form of a predator. Its jaws can bite through the ether.

moves.name: Shadow Strike
moves.description: Basic attack from the shadows.

moves.name: Phantom Bite
moves.description: Bite with shadow jaws that pierce any physical defense.

moves.name: Void Devour
moves.description: Opens its mouth toward the void and devours the target's vital energy.

distortion.name: Abyssogath
distortion.description: The epic form. It has no weight because it exists between dimensions. Its body is dark electricity, a living paradox that accumulates power with every blink.

moves.name: Shadow Strike
moves.description: Basic attack from the shadows.

moves.name: Phantom Bite
moves.description: Bite with shadow jaws that pierce any physical defense.

moves.name: Dimensional Collapse
moves.description: Collapses dimensional space around all enemies, crushing them with the darkness of the void.

name: Tidalkin
description: A small ocean elemental in the form of a floating jellyfish. Its transparent body contains seawater in perpetual motion.

moves.name: Water Jet
moves.description: Fires a pressurized water jet at the enemy.

moves.name: Tentacle Wrap
moves.description: Wraps the target with water tentacles that limit their movement.

moves.name: Maelstrom
moves.description: Generates a water whirlwind that drags all enemies.

distortion.name: Abysselk
distortion.description: Tidalkin descends to the ocean floor and takes the form of a juvenile leviathan. Its internal pressure can match that of the abyssal trenches.

moves.name: Water Jet
moves.description: Fires a pressurized water jet at the enemy.

moves.name: Depth Charge
moves.description: Fires a marine pressure bomb that explodes underwater at the opponent.

moves.name: Abyss Pressure
moves.description: Applies the deep-sea pressure to the target, crushing them with invisible force.

distortion.name: Leviathorn
distortion.description: The epic form. A deep-water leviathan with coral iron armor. Each scale is a metal plate forged under tons of oceanic pressure.

moves.name: Water Jet
moves.description: Fires a pressurized water jet at the enemy.

moves.name: Depth Charge
moves.description: Fires a marine pressure bomb that explodes underwater at the opponent.

moves.name: Oceanic Judgment
moves.description: The leviathan summons the power of all the world's oceans in a devastating biblical-scale attack.

name: Ironpup
description: A mechanical pup built from animated scrap. Nobody knows how it came to life, but its loyalty is absolute and its teeth are tempered steel.

moves.name: Steel Bite
moves.description: Mordisco con dientes de acero que penetra cualquier armadura.

moves.name: Scrap Volley
moves.description: Fires fragments of its own body as shrapnel.

moves.name: Overdrive Crash
moves.description: Activates overdrive mode and charges the target with all its mechanical force.

distortion.name: Ferrocanis
distortion.description: Ironpup matures into a fully armored war dog. Its legs are hydraulic cylinders and its tail functions as a steel whip.

moves.name: Steel Bite
moves.description: Mordisco con dientes de acero que penetra cualquier armadura.

moves.name: Hydraulic Slam
moves.description: Strikes with its hydraulic legs with mechanically amplified force.

moves.name: Mecha Rampage
moves.description: Goes berserk in total attack mode, striking with all mechanical limbs simultaneously.

distortion.name: Titancanis
distortion.description: The epic form. A colossal war dog with integrated plasma engines. Its eyes are energy reactors and its breath is magnesium fire.

moves.name: Steel Bite
moves.description: Mordisco con dientes de acero que penetra cualquier armadura.

moves.name: Hydraulic Slam
moves.description: Strikes with its hydraulic legs with mechanically amplified force.

moves.name: Nuclear Charge
moves.description: Charges at nuclear speed with all reactors at maximum, sweeping everything in its path.

name: Vorynthael
description: The Guardian of the Stellar Threshold. A being of pure astral energy that exists on the frontier between the known universe and absolute void. It was the first to witness the Big Bang and will be the last to extinguish the stars. Its visible form is not its real body, merely the projection that allows mortals to look upon it without losing their minds.

moves.name: Stellar Touch
moves.description: The Guardian's lightest touch equals the energy of a dwarf star. An infallible basic attack.

moves.name: Void Rift
moves.description: Opens a crack in the fabric of spacetime that sucks the energy from all enemies.

moves.name: Supernova Edict
moves.description: Vorynthael imposes its will upon reality and detonates a miniature supernova. Everything that is not eternal perishes.

distortion.name: Vorynthael Unbound
distortion.description: The Projection falls. The true Vorynthael is revealed: a formless, sizeless, massless entity. It is the void that precedes creation and the silence that follows destruction. Myths that behold it in this state are forever marked. Its attacks are no longer physical — they are redefinitions of reality.

moves.name: Stellar Touch
moves.description: The Guardian's lightest touch equals the energy of a dwarf star.

moves.name: Entropic Grasp
moves.description: The hand of entropy closes on the target. Life retreats. Time reverses locally.

moves.name: End of All
moves.description: The ultimate attack. Vorynthael Unbound speaks the last word of the universe. An energy pulse as ancient as nothingness strikes all enemies with the weight of cosmic extinction.
